notes: Live delta now works reliably (shows from lap two). The engineer measures your real catch rate per lap from live gaps - ask 'how much am I gaining per lap?'. Answers never get lost anymore: if an urgent callout interrupts, your answer is spoken right after it. Strategy panel now shows the correct pit stop count on every sim, labels total refuel clearly, and plans MANDATORY pit stops - including a loud warning if yours is still open near the end. Thanks for the reports!
